hooks.command: STDIN=$(cat); { echo "--- hook fired at $(date) ---"; echo "PATH=$PATH"; echo "jq: $(command -v jq 2>&1)"; echo "claude: $(command -v claude 2>&1)"; echo "STDIN_LEN=${#STDIN}"; echo "--- stdin raw ---"; echo "$STDIN"; echo "--- end stdin ---"; COMMAND=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>&1); echo "Parsed command: $COMMAND"; if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -q 'git commit'; then echo "MATCH: would invoke run_review.sh"; bash .claude/hooks/run_review.sh < /dev/null; echo "run_review.sh exit code: $?"; else echo "NO MATCH"; fi; echo "--- end ---"; } >> .claude/reviews/hook-diag.log 2>&1
